stand.notes: Source version: unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by local pinned-source inspection. Header presence is not delivered-firmware evidence; commissioning was unavailable.

move_velocity.notes: Source version: unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by local pinned-source inspection. No approved motion test was performed; delivered support is unknown.

stop.notes: Source version: unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by local pinned-source inspection. Software stop behavior and the physical E-Stop chain were not verified.

camera.notes: Source version: live product page, unversioned. Checked 2026-07-18 by product-table inspection for the operator-reported R1 SKU. Delivered device, format, calibration, transport, and permission are unknown.

audio_input.notes: Source version: live product page (unversioned) and unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by product/local-source inspection. Example constants are 16 kHz mono signed 16-bit PCM; delivered format, timing, permission, and privacy procedure remain unverified.

audio_output.notes: Source version: live product page (unversioned) and unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by product/local-source inspection. No playback or sound output was run; delivered availability and approval are unknown.

depth_camera.notes: Source version: live product page, unversioned. Checked 2026-07-18 by product-table inspection of the R1 row. A binocular camera label is not evidence of a depth stream or API.

navigation.notes: Source version: Week 01 baseline at 2026-07-15. Checked 2026-07-18 by source inventory. No R1-specific first-party support evidence or delivered-system test was available.

obstacle_avoidance.notes: Source version: Week 01 baseline at 2026-07-15. Checked 2026-07-18 by source inventory. Sensor, algorithm, behavior, and delivered safety response are unknown.

ros2.notes: Source version: unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by local source-boundary review. SDK DDS usage alone does not prove supported R1 ROS 2 compatibility.

sit.notes: Source version: unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by local header inventory. Sit is commented out in the header/example; that is neither support evidence nor proof of delivered unavailability.
